title: Best SentinelOne Alternatives & Competitors 2026
description: Looking for the best alternatives to SentinelOne? We compared 3 competing security & compliance platforms across features, pricing, and user ratings to help you find the right fit for your team.

alternatives.name: Okta
alternatives.description: Okta is a leading security & compliance platform offering competitive features.

alternatives.name: Auth0
alternatives.description: Auth0 is a leading security & compliance platform offering competitive features.

alternatives.name: CrowdStrike
alternatives.description: CrowdStrike is a leading security & compliance platform offering competitive features.

faqs.question: What are the best alternatives to SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: Our top alternatives to SentinelOne include Okta, Auth0, CrowdStrike. Each offers different strengths depending on your needs.

faqs.question: Why would I switch from SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: Common reasons include pricing, feature gaps, scalability limitations, or the need for better integration with existing tools.

faqs.question: Is SentinelOne better than Okta?
faqs.answer: SentinelOne excels at its core functionality, but alternatives may offer better value, features, or specific capabilities depending on your requirements.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest alternative to SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: Several alternatives offer competitive pricing. Check our detailed comparison for a complete pricing breakdown.

faqs.question: Are there free alternatives to SentinelOne?
faqs.answer: Yes, some alternatives offer free tiers suitable for individuals and small teams. Our guide covers both free and paid options.

faqs.question: How do I migrate from SentinelOne to an alternative?
faqs.answer: Most alternatives offer import tools and migration support. The complexity depends on data volume and integration depth.

faqs.question: What features does SentinelOne lack?
faqs.answer: SentinelOne may lack certain advanced features found in dedicated alternatives. Our comparison highlights feature differences.

faqs.question: Which alternative is easiest to implement?
faqs.answer: Implementation difficulty varies. Our reviews include hands-on assessments of setup complexity for each alternative.

faqs.question: Can I use SentinelOne alongside its alternatives?
faqs.answer: Many teams use multiple tools for different workflows. Some alternatives integrate directly with SentinelOne.

faqs.question: What do users say about SentinelOne alternatives?
faqs.answer: User reviews on G2 and Capterra provide valuable insights. Our analysis incorporates thousands of real user experiences.

sections.title: Overview
sections.body: SentinelOne is a leading security & compliance platform with a strong market presence. Here are the top alternatives worth considering.

sections.title: Selection Criteria
sections.body: When evaluating alternatives, consider these key factors to find the right fit for your organization.
items: Pricing and total cost of ownership
